violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, chicken was placed hot and covered in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Chicken was moved to sheet pans at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: cart in cooking area prep unit meat grinder meat grinder table New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
